scaffolds.name: BeRhGC1_full
scaffolds.source_header: tr|A0A060H1D7|A0A060H1D7_BLAEM Bacterio-rhodopsin/guanylyl cyclase 1 fusion protein OS=Blastocladiella emersonii OX=4808 GN=gc1 PE=1 SV=1
scaffolds.notes: BeRhGC1: Blastocladiella emersonii rhodopsin-guanylyl cyclase (626 aa). Rhodopsin domain ~1-400, linker ~400-490, cyclase domain ~490-626. Schiff-base Lys at K338 (protected). Cyclase catalytic IGDAYL motif at 499. Mutable positions below are HEURISTIC — selected by rough homology to BR/ChR2 TM3/TM5/TM6 retinal-pocket patterns without a real alignment or structure. Expert review via configs/rhgc_position_review.csv required before design run results are trusted.

mutable_positions.reason: retinal_pocket spectral_tuning counterion_candidate HEURISTIC position in TM3 (DIWYGY motif); analogous to BR D85. D->E conservative (charge-preserving, longer sidechain); D->N removes negative charge (expected disruptive).
retinal_pocket spectral_tuning aromatic_wall HEURISTIC TM3 Trp adjacent to counterion; analogous to BR W86. W->F removes indole NH; W->Y swaps indole for phenol.

retinal_pocket spectral_tuning aromatic_tuning HEURISTIC TM5 Tyr in sequence context EITQYPHDP; commonly involved in spectral tuning in microbial opsins. Y->F removes phenolic OH; Y->W larger aromatic.
retinal_pocket spectral_tuning proton_donor_candidate HEURISTIC TM6 Asp in NDYAL motif (classic opsin TM6 conserved D); possible analog of BR D96. D->E conservative; D->N removes charge.
